data.title: ECB member Cipollone hints digital euro launch in 2029, delayed from 2020 introduction.
data.description: Europe's digital euro was first proposed in October 2020, but its launch may be delayed until 2029 as stated by ECB Executive Board member Piero Cipollone.

data.title: Aiper wins Kantar's "2025 Pioneering Global Brand" award for AI innovation in smart yard products. Leading with cordless robotic pool cleaners.
data.description: In Shanghai on September 24, 2025, Kantar revealed its list of "2025 Pioneering Global Brands." Aiper, renowned for its cordless robotic pool cleaners, was the sole recipient in this category for its exceptional performance. Kantar, a widely respected brand evaluation organization, recognized Aiper's leadership in the industry, solidifying its position as a global brand to watch.

data.title: Akamai launches Managed Service for API Performance to enhance security with expert tuning. (Character count: 93)
data.description: A recent press release highlighted how expert-managed API tuning can enhance security efforts with more efficiency. Akamai Technologies, a leading cybersecurity and cloud computing firm based in CAMBRIDGE, Mass., shared news on their Managed Service for API Performance. The service aims to provide stronger security measures while reducing overall effort required. This update was unveiled on Sept. 24, 2025, by Akamai Technologies, a notable company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol AKAM.

data.title: Subtle Medical recognized by TIME as a top HealthTech company in 2025 for AI solutions improving medical imaging.
data.description: In a recent announcement dated September 24, 2025, TIME recognized Subtle Medical for its exceptional contributions in advancing AI-driven solutions for medical imaging. Based in Menlo Park, Subtle Medical is a prominent player in creating innovative AI technologies for the healthcare industry. The company's efforts have led to faster and higher-quality medical imaging processes. This acknowledgment highlights the significant impact of Subtle Medical's work in the field.

data.title: Nuvalent (Nasdaq: NUVL) to attend UBS 2025 Virtual Oncology Day - CEO Dr. James Porter presenting.
data.description: A company known as Nuvalent, Inc., based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, revealed on September 24, 2025, that its CEO, James Porter, Ph.D., made an announcement. Nuvalent is listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange under the symbol NUVL and specializes in developing precise therapies for verified kinase targets in cancer treatment.

data.title: Blue Water Autonomy chooses Conrad Shipyard to construct autonomous surface vessels, marking a post-Series A milestone.
data.description: Blue Water Autonomy, a Boston technology and shipbuilding company, has reached a significant milestone following its Series A funding round. This achievement signifies a transition from research and development to large-scale production, indicating a promising future for American shipyards. The company specializes in creating easily manufacturable unmanned ships for the United States. The event, which took place on September 24, 2025, demonstrates a pivotal moment as the company moves towards enhancing its presence in the maritime industry and contributing to the economy.

data.title: JK Tech wins Silver Globee Award for AI Company of the Year at 17th Annual 2025 Globee Business Awards, recognized for driving measurable business impact in advancing Generative AI capabilities.  #JKTech #AI #GlobeeBusinessAwards
data.description: Proudly hailed for advancing generative AI capabilities and delivering tangible business results, JK Tech has achieved significant recognition in the field. The company was recently awarded the Silver Winner of the Artificial Intelligence Company of the Year at the 17th Annual 2025 Awards in New York City on September 24th. This recognition showcases JK Tech's commitment to innovation and driving impactful advancements in AI technologies, solidifying its position as a leading player in the industry.

data.title: Cohere Capital invests in Leverege, a VisionAI tech company based in Maryland, offering AI software products for IoT.
data.description: Cohere Capital Partners, a private equity firm based in Boston, specializing in technology investments, has recently announced a strategic investment in Leverege, a tech company based in Rockville, Maryland. Leverege is renowned for its AI-native software solutions that utilize Internet of Things (IoT) and VisionAI technology. The investment aims to facilitate Leverege's growth in this sector. The company offers a range of AI-native software products designed to lower expenses, boost productivity, and improve customer experiences.

data.title: Options enhances security leadership with Microsoft Solutions Partner Specialization for Threat Detection in London, New York, and Hong Kong.
data.description: Options has enhanced its security leadership by achieving the Microsoft Solutions Partner Specialization for Threat Detection. The company, with offices in London, New York, and Hong Kong, continues to prioritize security measures by partnering with Microsoft to strengthen threat detection capabilities. This specialization underscores Options' commitment to providing top-tier security solutions for its global clientele.

data.title: TD Synnex likely to report improved Q3 earnings, with analysts revising forecasts. Expected: $3.05 per share (up from $2.86) and $15.11B revenue (up from $14.68B). Strategic collaboration with AWS. Stock rose 0.3% to $151.88.
data.description: Before the opening bell on Thursday, Sept. 25, TD SYNNEX Corporation (NYSE: SNX) will reveal its Q3 earnings report. Analysts predict earnings of $3.05 per share, an increase from $2.86 per share last year. The company is expected to announce quarterly revenue of $15.11 billion, up from $14.68 billion in the previous year. Earlier, TD Synnex entered a strategic partnership with AWS to boost AI and cloud growth. The stock closed at $151.88, showing a 0.3% increase. For more details and updated analyst ratings, readers can refer to the Benzinga website.

data.title: THOR Industries boasted fiscal 2025 Q4 revenue of $2.52 billion with $209.5 million in Adjusted EBITDA. Market share saw incremental growth, while notable segments like North American Towable RVs exhibited positive margins and increased income before taxes. The company's total debt reduced by $237.0 million, with $158.8 million returned to shareholders. Strategic restructuring enhances operational efficiency. CEO praises teams' performance in challenging times, highlighting plans for market growth and operational efficiency improvements.
data.description: THOR Industries, Inc. reported solid financial results for fiscal year 2025 despite a slight decrease in net sales to $9.58 billion. Gross profit margin decreased to 14% while net income attributable to THOR increased to $258.6 million. Earnings per share also rose to $4.84. Cash flows from operations declined to $577.9 million, but Adjusted EBITDA reached $659.1 million. The company made debt payments of $237 million and returned $158.8 million to shareholders. Quarterly revenue was $2.52 billion with Adjusted EBITDA at $209.5 million. The North American Towable and Motorized segments saw market share growth, with Towable gross profit margin at 13.3% and Motorized at 11.3%. Retail sales for the Towable segment improved, while wholesale shipments declined by 10.1%. Unit shipments for Motorized RVs increased by 15.9%. THOR stated that strategic initiatives, organizational restructuring, and operational efficiencies are key to driving long-term success. Management remains focused on improving market share and operational efficiency. CEO Bob Martin and COO Todd Woelfer expressed confidence in the company's performance and growth prospects for fiscal year 2026. Colleen Zuhl, CFO, highlighted the company's liquidity position and flexibility for potential opportunities. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Sen. Elizabeth Warren raised concerns over potential conflicts of interest involving Trump's Crypto & AI Czar, David Sacks, who may be overstaying his 130-day term limit. Warren sees it as another example of corruption in the administration.
data.description: Senator Elizabeth Warren from Massachusetts expressed concerns on Tuesday about potential conflicts of interest involving David Sacks, appointed as the Trump administration's Crypto and AI Czar. Sacks, selected by President Donald Trump in December 2025, is being scrutinized by Warren for potentially surpassing his term limit to continue exerting influence on cryptocurrency policy. Warren labeled the situation as another instance of corruption within the Trump administration, citing significant conflicts of interest already present. A thorough investigation into this matter is being initiated by the Democratic lawmaker to address the issue.
Stocks fell as Fed chief warned about high valuations. Micron's strong earnings and guidance led to Dow Jones futures rising.

data.title: Wall Street skeptical of Ethereum despite potential supercycle from growing adoption and AI innovation, per BitMine.
data.description: Increased adoption of cryptocurrencies on Wall Street and the use of AI platforms could potentially lead to a significant surge in the value of Ethereum. BitMine, the leading corporate investor in Ether, predicts this could spark a "supercycle" for the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Palm Valley Family Dentistry in Ponte Vedra Beach, Florida, launches redesigned website for better patient experience.
data.description: Palm Valley Family Dentistry in Ponte Vedra Beach, Florida, revealed on September 24, 2025, the introduction of its revamped website, providing an improved user experience for existing and potential patients. The updated site can be found at...

data.title: Desay SV and NTT DATA collaborate on SDV platform on 10th Sept 2025 to innovate software-defined vehicles using AI.
data.description: In Munich on September 24, 2025, it was reported that Desay SV had formed a strategic partnership with NTT DATA on September 10, 2025. Desay SV, a company specializing in automotive technology, joined forces with NTT DATA, a renowned global provider of digital business and technology services. The collaboration between the two companies focuses on leveraging artificial intelligence (AI) to revolutionize software-defined vehicles. This partnership aims to bring innovative solutions to the automotive industry through cutting-edge AI technology.

data.title: Dubai Design District initiates open call for d3 Awards honoring emerging MENA talent in architecture with AED 100,000 prize.
data.description: A new award ceremony, the d3 Awards, will recognize emerging talent in the MENA region with a special focus on architecture. The first edition will grant a significant prize of AED 100,000 to the winner. Architects and designers with specializations in interiors, landscapes, and spatial design are encouraged to participate in this inaugural event.

data.title: Taiwantrade.com introduces 6 new sector-specific portals to enhance trade relations with Europe.
data.description: Recently in Taipei on September 24, 2025, Taiwan's official B2B portal Taiwantrade.com unveiled 6 new Sector Online Showcases. These include Auto Parts, Hardware, Hand Tools, and Plumbing among others. The showcases cater to various industries such as auto (auto.taiwantrade.com), hardware (fastener.taiwantrade.com), and hand tools (handtools.taiwantrade.com). Taiwantrade.com aims to provide a platform for businesses to access these sectors efficiently. The move signifies a strategic expansion with a focus on enhancing trade opportunities.

data.title: Uranium Energy Corp on NYSE American: UEC transitions to uranium production with Burke Hollow near start-up in Texas, creates vertically integrated company, filing fiscal 2025 report.
data.description: UEC, listed on NYSE American, is experiencing a breakthrough year as it moves towards uranium production in Wyoming. Additionally, the Burke Hollow facility in Texas is close to beginning operations. The recent establishment of the U.S. Uranium Refining & Conversion Corp marks the creation of the country's sole vertically integrated uranium company. This includes operations ranging from mining to conversion, enhancing UEC's market position.

data.title: Carter's implements stockholder rights agreement in response to 16.86% stock accumulation by RWWM. #NYSE #CRI #business
data.description: In Atlanta, Carter’s, Inc., known as North America's leading apparel company for babies and young children, revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a temporary stockholder rights agreement. This decision came following the discovery of RWWM, Inc. acquiring a notable portion (16.86%) of Carter’s common stock. The Rights Agreement aims to safeguard the company’s shareholders and business continuity. Carter’s, Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol CRI.
